---
title: Experimental Design
description: "Planning experiments for valid inference: randomisation, blocking, factorial designs, split-plot, response surface, and optimal design"
---

An experiment is only as good as its design. No amount of sophisticated analysis rescues a study whose structure confounds the treatment effect with nuisance variation. This area covers the principles of experimental design -- randomisation, replication, blocking, factorial structure -- and the catalogue of specific designs that economise on runs while still answering the scientific question.

Tutorials are framed around the design-then-analyse workflow: the ANOVA table and the factorial model for each design are shown alongside the randomisation procedure and the graphical summaries (main-effects, interaction, contour) that communicate the results.

## Designs covered

- Completely randomised design (CRD) with equal and unequal replication
- Randomised complete block design (RCBD) and incomplete block designs (BIBD)
- Latin square and Graeco-Latin square designs for two nuisance factors
- Factorial designs: $2^k$, $3^k$, and general mixed-level factorials
- Fractional factorials, resolution, and alias structure for screening experiments
- Split-plot and strip-plot designs for hard-to-change factors
- Repeated-measures and crossover designs
- Response surface methodology: central composite and Box-Behnken designs
- Optimal design theory: D-, A-, I-optimality; algorithmic construction
- Taguchi methods: signal-to-noise, inner and outer arrays
- Mixture designs: simplex lattice, simplex centroid, constrained mixtures
- Robust parameter design and its role in quality improvement

Packages: `AlgDesign`, `agricolae`, `rsm`, `DoE.base`, `FrF2`, `mixexp`, `crossdes`, `lme4`.

<!-- card-grid-injected -->

## Tutorials

::: {.card-grid}

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [2^k Factorial Designs](factorial-2k.qmd)
Full factorial experiments with k two-level factors
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [3^k Factorial Designs](factorial-3k.qmd)
Full factorial experiments with k three-level factors
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Balanced Incomplete Block Designs](balanced-incomplete-block.qmd)
BIBDs when block size is smaller than treatment count
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Box-Behnken Designs](box-behnken-design.qmd)
Three-level rotatable designs for RSM without factorial-corner runs
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Central Composite Designs](central-composite-design.qmd)
Response-surface designs combining factorial, axial, and centre points
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Completely Randomised Design](completely-randomized-design.qmd)
The simplest experimental design: random assignment of treatments to units
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Constrained Mixture Designs](constrained-mixture.qmd)
Mixture experiments with lower and upper bounds on components
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Crossover Designs](crossover-designs.qmd)
Within-subject comparison of treatments with washout and carryover consideration
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Desirability Functions](desirability-function.qmd)
Multi-response optimisation via geometric-mean desirability scores
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Fractional Factorial Designs](fractional-factorial-design.qmd)
A fraction of a 2^k design: economical screening with acceptable confounding
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Graeco-Latin Square Designs](graeco-latin-square.qmd)
Blocking on three nuisance factors by superimposing two orthogonal Latin squares
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Latin Square Designs](latin-square.qmd)
Blocking on two nuisance factors via a Latin-square arrangement
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Method of Steepest Ascent](steepest-ascent.qmd)
Moving along the gradient of a first-order response surface toward the optimum
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Optimal Designs: D, A, I](optimal-design-d-a-i.qmd)
D-, A-, I-, and G-optimality criteria for computer-generated designs
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Orthogonal Arrays](orthogonal-arrays.qmd)
Tabulated fractional-factorial arrays L4, L8, L9, L16, L27
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Plackett-Burman Designs](plackett-burman.qmd)
Highly efficient two-level screening designs for many factors
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Power Analysis for DOE](power-in-doe.qmd)
Calculating power for detecting main effects and interactions in designed experiments
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Principles of Blocking](blocking-principles.qmd)
Local control of nuisance variability for precision gains
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Randomisation in Design](randomization-in-design.qmd)
Purpose, procedures, and role of randomisation in experimental design
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Randomised Complete Block Design](randomised-complete-block.qmd)
Blocking to control known nuisance variation, with construction, analysis, and interpretation in R
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Repeated-Measures Designs](repeated-measures-design.qmd)
Designs with a within-subject factor: multiple measurements per unit
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Resolution and Aliasing](resolution-aliasing.qmd)
Understanding the confounding structure of fractional factorial designs
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Response Surface Methodology](response-surface-methodology.qmd)
Optimising processes via second-order polynomial response surfaces
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Robust Parameter Design](robust-parameter-design.qmd)
Choosing controllable factor levels to minimise response variance across noise factors
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Signal-to-Noise Ratios](signal-to-noise-ratio.qmd)
Taguchi's SNR metrics combining mean and variance
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Simplex Centroid Designs](mixture-centroid.qmd)
Mixture designs including centroids of all sub-simplices
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Simplex Lattice Mixture Designs](mixture-designs-simplex.qmd)
Experimental designs for component-proportion factors that sum to 1
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Split-Plot Designs](split-plot-design.qmd)
Designs with hard-to-change and easy-to-change factors
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Strip-Plot Designs](strip-plot-design.qmd)
Designs with two hard-to-change factors applied to perpendicular strips
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Taguchi Methods](taguchi-methods.qmd)
Orthogonal-array designs and signal-to-noise optimisation for quality engineering
:::

:::
